overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk game showing a player character following an NPC in a white suit and a small child through Night City. The scene transitions from an open plaza with holographic ground displays to a covered walkway under an elevated highway, ending in a dark industrial storage area with green lighting.

agents.ego_description: following an NPC in a white suit and a small child across the open plaza

notable_agents.action: man in white suit walking with a small child toward the covered walkway

entered.detail: large blue illuminated display on the ground showing NC and geometric patterns
large curved yellow highway structure spanning across the plaza
tall buildings with neon lights and advertisements in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, featuring a prominent blue holographic display embedded in the ground. The camera follows a man in a white suit and a small child as they walk across the open space toward a large yellow elevated highway structure in the distance.

events.description: moving from open plaza into covered area beneath the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the man and child as they enter the covered walkway

entered.detail: tall rectangular concrete pillars with bright vertical white lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the elevated highway, transitioning from the open plaza to a sheltered walkway. The environment becomes darker with green ambient lighting, and illuminated concrete pillars line the right side while traffic moves on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: long covered pedestrian corridor with illuminated pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind the man and child along the covered corridor

notable_agents.action: man in white suit holding the child's hand while walking

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the covered walkway beneath the highway, following the man and child as they walk along the yellow tactile paving. The corridor is lined with evenly spaced illuminated pillars on the right, creating a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching industrial storage area

events.description: pedestrian in red leather jacket passes by closely on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow while passing other pedestrians in the corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red leather jacket walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: green industrial crates stacked near the wall marking the entrance to a storage area

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses down the corridor, a pedestrian in a red jacket passes by on the left. The walkway approaches a darker industrial area where green crates are stacked on the right, and the lighting becomes dimmer toward the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial storage room with stacked crates

events.description: entering dark interior space with industrial shelving and red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: following the man and child as they turn right into the dimly lit storage area

entered.detail: metal racks with boxes and equipment in the dark storage room
red glowing lights on the ceiling providing minimal illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the characters as they turn right into a dark industrial storage area, leaving the covered walkway behind. The space is dimly lit with red emergency lights and filled with stacked green crates and metal shelving units.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, holographic urban plaza into a dim, industrial storage zone. It begins by trailing a man in a white suit and a small child across an open night plaza featuring a blue holographic ground display, moving steadily toward a massive yellow elevated highway. As the camera passes beneath the highway, the open space shifts into a sheltered walkway where the lighting turns green and rhythmic illuminated pillars line the path. The scene then progresses along yellow tactile paving, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket before the corridor narrows toward a darker area filled with stacked green crates. Finally, the camera follows the characters as they turn right, leaving the walkway behind to enter a dimly lit industrial warehouse characterized by red emergency lights and metal shelving.
